esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
// Temp file creation indicates queries spilling to disk (insufficient work_mem or poor query plans)
| WHERE postgresql.temp_files IS NOT NULL
| EVAL temp_files_val = TO_DOUBLE(postgresql.temp_files)
| WHERE temp_files_val > 0
| STATS temp_file_count = SUM(temp_files_val) BY service.instance.id, postgresql.database.name
| WHERE temp_file_count > 0
